creator: alan.snelson@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the heads up on this - updated for 0.12:

--- p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/Makefile       2010-06-03 08:40:09.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/Makefile  2010-06-03
08:49:40.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      DBIx-VersionedDDL
-PORTVERSION=   0.06
+PORTVERSION=   0.12
 CATEGORIES=    databases perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
diff -ruN p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/distinfo
/usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/distinfo
--- p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/distinfo       2010-06-03 08:40:09.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL/distinfo  2010-06-03
08:49:46.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.06.tar.gz) = 68a12e890b78964197e987191c1ceb18
-SHA256 (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.06.tar.gz) =
2b39193bc661b67b0c65c38387a1468b21a46546e92a4eccbf6e83458cbfcb91
-SIZE (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.06.tar.gz) = 8246
+MD5 (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.12.tar.gz) = 7742b7067276191d55a6b4a98195b677
+SHA256 (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.12.tar.gz) =
3c298bd7de747d4de9733aac2f3c393c2eb445f6bc09d74b67d7a6d28138e6db
+SIZE (DBIx-VersionedDDL-0.12.tar.gz) = 9332


On 3 June 2010 07:51, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of databases/p5-DBIx-VersionedDDL,
>
> Please note that PR ports/147362 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
